# CWE-1220 negative: owner-scoped invoice access (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1220-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1220 mitigated: query filters by authenticated owner_id and invoice id.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

type InvoiceScopedPure struct {
	ID     int     `json:"id"`
	Owner  int     `json:"owner_id"`
	Amount float64 `json:"amount"`
}

func GetInvoiceScopedPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		ownerHeader := r.Header.Get("X-User-ID")
		ownerID, err := strconv.Atoi(ownerHeader)
		if err != nil || ownerID == 0 {
			http.Error(w, "login required", http.StatusUnauthorized)
			return
		}
		id := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
		var inv InvoiceScopedPure
		err = db.QueryRow(
			"SELECT id, owner_id, amount FROM invoices WHERE id = $1 AND owner_id = $2",
			id, ownerID,
		).Scan(&inv.ID, &inv.Owner, &inv.Amount)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "not found", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(inv)
	}
}
